faqs.question: What pests are covered in your general pest control service in Whitestone?
faqs.answer: Our general pest control service covers the most common household pests in Whitestone including ants, cockroaches, spiders, silverfish, earwigs, crickets, mice, and rats. We conduct a thorough inspection and customize treatments based on the specific pest issues affecting your property, ensuring comprehensive protection year-round.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide pest control service in Whitestone?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service to Whitestone residents in most cases. Our team understands that pest problems require prompt attention, so we prioritize quick response times while maintaining the highest quality of service. Call us in the morning and we can often have a technician at your door that afternoon.

faqs.question: What determines the cost between $175 and $300 for general pest control?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on factors including the size of your property, the severity of the infestation, the type of pests present, and whether you need a one-time treatment or recurring service. Smaller apartments typically start at $175, while larger single-family homes or properties with extensive pest issues may reach $300. We always provide a free inspection and upfront quote before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are your pest control treatments safe for children and pets in Whitestone homes?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We prioritize the safety of your family and pets by using EPA-approved, low-toxicity products and integrated pest management techniques. Our technicians are trained in the latest application methods that target pests while minimizing exposure to people and animals. We'll provide specific guidance on any precautions needed after treatment, though most modern treatments allow families to remain home during service.
